# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

admin:
  access_log_path: /tmp/admin_access.log
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 9901

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: admin
    address:
      socket_address:
        address: 127.0.0.1
        port_value: 9901
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.common.access_log.v3.AccessLog
          path: /tmp/admin_access.log

stats:
  envoy_admin_only:
    provider:
      name: envoyStats
      config:
        listener_filter:
          stat_prefix: envoy-admin
  sampling:
    enabled: false

http:
  http_filters:
  - name: envoy.admin
    typed_config:
      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
      stats:
        provider:
          name: envoyStats
          config:
            listener_filter:
              stat_prefix: admin
      route_config:
        name: admin
        virtual_hosts:
        - name: admin
          domains:
          - "*/"
          routes:
          - match:
              prefix: "/stats"
            route:
              cluster_name: envoy_cluster_admin

routes:
- match:
    prefix: "/"
  route:
    cluster_name: envoy_cluster_admin

clusters:
- name: envoy_cluster_admin
  type: strict_dns
  connect_timeout: 5s
  load_assignment:
    least_request_ratio: 1.0
    clusters:
      - name: admin
        endpoints:
          - lb_subset: "default"
            host_selection_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: 127.0.0.1
                port_value: 9901
